metadata.description: Functions for detecting anomalies and outliers in data using various statistical and machine learning methods

detect_statistical_outliers.description: Detect outliers using statistical methods like z-score, modified z-score, IQR, or percentile-based approaches

optional_params.name: method
optional_params.description: Method to use: 'zscore', 'modified_zscore', 'iqr', or 'percentile' (default: 'zscore')

optional_params.name: threshold
optional_params.description: Threshold for determining outliers: For zscore/modified_zscore: number of standard deviations; For iqr: multiplier of IQR (values outside Q1-threshold*IQR and Q3+threshold*IQR); For percentile: values below/above percentile thresholds (default: 3.0)

optional_params.name: window
optional_params.description: Window size for rolling outlier detection (if None, use entire series)

optional_params.name: time_column
optional_params.description: Time column to sort by before calculations (optional)

optional_params.name: group_columns
optional_params.description: Columns to group by before calculations (for panel data, optional)

outputs.description: Function that detects outliers in an AnomalyPipe using statistical methods

detect_contextual_anomalies.description: Detect contextual anomalies by comparing actual values with expected values using time series models
data_requirements: Time series data with timestamp column

optional_params.name: method
optional_params.description: Method to use: 'residual', 'prediction_interval', 'changepoint' (default: 'residual')

optional_params.name: model_type
optional_params.description: Model to generate expected values: 'ewm', 'sarimax', 'decomposition' (default: 'ewm')

optional_params.name: threshold
optional_params.description: Threshold for determining anomalies (std deviations for residuals, prediction intervals) (default: 3.0)

optional_params.name: window
optional_params.description: Window size for rolling model fitting (default: 30)

optional_params.name: seasonal_period
optional_params.description: Number of periods in a seasonal cycle (if None, will be estimated)

optional_params.name: group_columns
optional_params.description: Columns to group by before calculations (for panel data, optional)

optional_params.name: datetime_format
optional_params.description: Format string for parsing dates if they are not already datetime objects (optional)

outputs.description: Function that detects contextual anomalies in an AnomalyPipe

detect_collective_anomalies.description: Detect collective anomalies using machine learning methods on multiple features
data_requirements: Multiple numerical columns for multivariate analysis
Time series data with timestamp column
Sufficient data points for ML model training

required_params.name: columns
required_params.description: Column(s) to analyze for anomalies (multiple columns for multivariate analysis)

optional_params.name: method
optional_params.description: Method to use: 'isolation_forest', 'lof' (default: 'isolation_forest')

optional_params.name: window
optional_params.description: Window size for rolling analysis (default: 30)

optional_params.name: contamination
optional_params.description: Expected proportion of anomalies in the data (default: 0.05)

optional_params.name: n_estimators
optional_params.description: Number of estimators (for tree-based methods, default: 100)

optional_params.name: group_columns
optional_params.description: Columns to group by before calculations (for panel data, optional)

optional_params.name: datetime_format
optional_params.description: Format string for parsing dates if they are not already datetime objects (optional)

outputs.description: Function that detects collective anomalies in an AnomalyPipe

calculate_seasonal_residuals.description: Calculate residuals after removing seasonal patterns using time series decomposition
data_requirements: Time series data with timestamp column
Sufficient data points for seasonal decomposition

optional_params.name: mseasonal_period
optional_params.description: Number of periods in a seasonal cycle (if None, will be estimated)

optional_params.name: mmethod
optional_params.description: Decomposition method: 'multiplicative' or 'additive' (default: 'multiplicative')

optional_params.name: mgroup_columns
optional_params.description: Columns to group by before calculations (for panel data, optional)

optional_params.name: mdatetime_format
optional_params.description: Format string for parsing dates if they are not already datetime objects (optional)

outputs.description: Function that calculates seasonal residuals in an AnomalyPipe

detect_anomalies_from_residuals.description: Detect anomalies from pre-calculated residuals using statistical methods
data_requirements: Sufficient data points for statistical analysis

optional_params.name: method
optional_params.description: Method to use: 'zscore', 'modified_zscore', 'iqr', or 'percentile' (default: 'zscore')

optional_params.name: threshold
optional_params.description: Threshold for determining anomalies (default: 3.0)

optional_params.name: suffix
optional_params.description: Suffix of columns containing residuals (default: '_residual')

optional_params.name: output_suffix
optional_params.description: Suffix for output anomaly flag columns (default: '_anomaly')

outputs.description: Function that detects anomalies from residuals in an AnomalyPipe

get_anomaly_summary.description: Get summary statistics and information about detected anomalies

optional_params.name: analysis_name
optional_params.description: Name of the analysis to get summary for (optional)

outputs.description: Function that gets anomaly summary from an AnomalyPipe

get_top_anomalies.description: Get the top N anomalies ranked by anomaly score or severity

optional_params.name: n
optional_params.description: Number of top anomalies to return (default: 10)

optional_params.name: time_column
optional_params.description: Time column to include in results (optional)

optional_params.name: analysis_name
optional_params.description: Name of the analysis to get top anomalies for (optional)

outputs.description: Function that gets top anomalies from an AnomalyPipe

detect_change_points.description: Detect change points in time series data using various statistical methods
use_cases: change point detection in time series
data_requirements: Time series data with timestamp column
Numerical data for change point analysis
Sufficient data points for change point detection

required_params.name: columns
required_params.description: Column(s) to analyze for change points

optional_params.name: min_size
optional_params.description: Minimum size of segments (default: 20)

optional_params.name: method
optional_params.description: Method to use: 'binary_segmentation', 'pelt', 'window' (default: 'binary_segmentation')

optional_params.name: penalty
optional_params.description: Penalty function: 'bic', 'aic', 'mbic' (default: 'bic')

optional_params.name: group_columns
optional_params.description: Columns to group by before calculations (for panel data, optional)

optional_params.name: datetime_format
optional_params.description: Format string for parsing dates if they are not already datetime objects (optional)

outputs.description: Function that detects change points in an AnomalyPipe

forecast_and_detect_anomalies.description: Forecast time series and detect anomalies based on forecast errors using various forecasting models
use_cases: time series forecasting with anomaly detection
data_requirements: Time series data with timestamp column
Sufficient historical data for model training

optional_params.name: forecast_periods
optional_params.description: Number of periods to forecast ahead (default: 5)

optional_params.name: model
optional_params.description: Forecasting model: 'arima', 'exponential_smoothing', 'sarimax' (default: 'arima')

optional_params.name: threshold
optional_params.description: Threshold for anomaly detection (number of std deviations, default: 2.0)

optional_params.name: seasonal_period
optional_params.description: Number of periods in a seasonal cycle (if None, will be estimated)

optional_params.name: group_columns
optional_params.description: Columns to group by before calculations (for panel data, optional)

optional_params.name: datetime_format
optional_params.description: Format string for parsing dates if they are not already datetime objects (optional)

outputs.description: Function that forecasts and detects anomalies in an AnomalyPipe

batch_detect_anomalies.description: Apply multiple anomaly detection methods and combine results using ensemble techniques

required_params.name: methods
required_params.description: List of method configurations, each with: 'name': Method name (e.g., 'statistical_outliers', 'contextual_anomalies'), 'params': Parameters for the method

optional_params.name: ensemble_method
optional_params.description: How to combine results: 'any' (union), 'all' (intersection), 'majority', 'weighted' (default: 'any')

optional_params.name: output_suffix
optional_params.description: Suffix for output anomaly flag columns (default: '_ensemble_anomaly')

outputs.description: Function that applies multiple anomaly detection methods in an AnomalyPipe
